title: 人机交互，机器人技术论文速递--(2026-03-26)
author: tianhe
digest: 今日最新 Arxiv 论文摘要汇总 (2026-03-26)
content:
璇玑枢，助力学术成长，点亮科研之路

 

今日论文合集：cs.HC人机交互13篇，cs.RO机器人技术27篇，q-bio.NC神经元和认知0篇

本文只展示部分论文，全部详情，AI总结请访问，或点击阅读原文
https://scouthe.github.io/arxiv_crawler_ai_enhanced/

 

 

人机交互(cs.HC:Human-Computer Interaction)

【1】A Neuro-Symbolic System for Interpretable Multimodal Physiological Signals Integration in Human Fatigue Detection

标题 : 用于人体疲劳检测中可解释的多模态生理信号集成的神经符号系统
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24358
作者：Mohammadreza Jamalifard,Yaxiong Lei,Parasto Azizinezhad,Javier Fumanal-Idocin,Javier Andreu-Perez
摘要：我们提出了一种神经符号架构，它使用基于注意力的编码器从眼球追踪和神经血流动力学、功能性近红外光谱、（fNIRS）窗口中学习四种可解释的生理概念、动眼动力学、注视稳定性、前额血流动力学和多模态，并将它们与使用学习权重和软阈值的可微近似推理规则相结合，以解决严格的手工规则和缺乏主题级对齐诊断的问题。我们将该系统应用于多模态生理信号的疲劳分类，该领域需要准确且可解释的模型，并具有可检查安全关键用途的内部推理。在对 18 名参与者（560 个样本）进行留一受试者评估时，该方法达到了 72.1% +/- 12.3% 的准确度，与调整后的基线相当，同时揭示了概念激活和规则激发强度。消融表明参与者特定校准的增益（+5.2 pp），没有 fNIRS 概念的适度下降（-1.2 pp），以及 Lukasiewicz 操作员的性能比产品略好（+ 0.9 pp）。我们还引入了概念保真度，这是一种来自保留标签的离线每个主题审核指标，它与每个主题的准确性密切相关（r = 0.843，p < 0.0001）。
Abstract：We propose a neuro-symbolic architecture that learns four interpretable physiological concepts, oculomotor dynamics, gaze stability, prefrontal hemodynamics, and multimodal, from eye-tracking and neural hemodynamics, functional near-infrared spectroscopy, (fNIRS) windows using attention-based encoders, and combines them with differentiable approximate reasoning rules using learned weights and soft thresholds, to address both rigid hand-crafted rules and the lack of subject-level alignment diagnostics. We apply this system to fatigue classification from multimodal physiological signals, a domain that requires models that are accurate and interpretable, with internal reasoning that can be inspected for safety-critical use. In leave-one-subject-out evaluation on 18 participants (560 samples), the method achieves 72.1% +/- 12.3% accuracy, comparable to tuned baselines while exposing concept activations and rule firing strengths. Ablations indicate gains from participant-specific calibration (+5.2 pp), a modest drop without the fNIRS concept (-1.2 pp), and slightly better performance with Lukasiewicz operators than product (+0.9 pp). We also introduce concept fidelity, an offline per-subject audit metric from held-out labels, which correlates strongly with per-subject accuracy (r=0.843, p < 0.0001).

 


【2】Honey, I shrunk the scientist -- Evaluating 2D, 3D, and VR interfaces for navigating samples under the microscope

标题 : 亲爱的，我缩小了科学家——评估在显微镜下导航样品的 2D、3D 和 VR 界面
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24337
作者：Jan Tiemann,Matthew McGinity,Ulrik Günther
摘要：在当代生物学和医学中，3D 显微镜是用于各种样品成像和操作的最广泛使用的技术之一。在显微镜下浏览这样一个微米大小的 3 维样品——例如找到相关的成像区域——可能会给实验者带来乏味的挑战。在本文中，我们研究 2D 桌面、3D 桌面或虚拟现实 (VR) 界面是否为 3D 样本的探索提供最佳的用户体验和性能。我们邀请了 12 名熟练的显微镜操作员在 2D、3D 和 VR 中执行两项不同的探索任务，并比较了所有条件的速度、可用性和完成度。我们的结果表明，使用 VR 在任务效率、可用性和用户接受度方面具有明显的优势。有趣的是，虽然 VR 在所有场景中都优于桌面 2D 和 3D，但 3D 桌面并没有优于 2D 桌面。
Abstract：In contemporary biology and medicine, 3D microscopy is one of the most widely-used techniques for imaging and manipulation of various kinds of samples. Navigating such a micrometer-sized, 3-dimensional sample under the microscope -- e.g. to find relevant imaging regions -- can pose a tedious challenge for the experimenter. In this paper, we examine whether 2D desktop, 3D desktop, or Virtual Reality (VR) interfaces provide the best user experience and performance for the exploration of 3D samples. We invited 12 skilled microscope operators to perform two different exploration tasks in 2D, 3D and VR and compared all conditions in terms speed, usability, and completion. Our results show a clear benefit when using VR -- in terms of task efficiency, usability, and user acceptance. Intriguingly, while VR outperformed desktop 2D and 3D in all scenarios, 3D desktop did not outperform 2D desktop.

 


【3】Human Factors in Detecting AI-Generated Portraits: Age, Sex, Device, and Confidence

标题 : 检测人工智能生成的肖像的人为因素：年龄、性别、设备和信心
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24048
作者：Sunwhi Kim,Sunyul Kim
摘要：生成式人工智能现在可以制作逼真的肖像，并在社交和新闻等环境中广泛传播。人类区分真实面孔和合成面孔的能力是时间敏感的，因为图像生成器不断改进，而公众对合成媒体的熟悉程度也在变化。在这里，我们提供了人类区分真实肖像和由 2025 年 7 月推出的模型生成的人工智能生成肖像的能力的带时间戳的快照。在 2025 年 8 月至 2026 年 1 月进行的一项大规模网络实验中，1,664 名 20-69 岁的参与者（移动设备 n = 1,330；PC n = 334）完成了两项强制选择任务（真实与人工智能）。每位参与者对从 210 张图像池中抽取的 20 项试验进行评判，其中包括真实的 FFHQ 照片以及来自 ChatGPT-4o 和 Imagen 3 的人工智能生成的肖像。总体准确率很高（平均值 85.2%，中位数 90%），但各组之间存在差异。 PC 参与者的表现比移动参与者高出 3.65 个百分点。两个设备组的准确率随着年龄的增长而下降，并且移动设备上的准确率比 PC 上的下降幅度更大（每年 -0.607 个百分点与 -0.230 个百分点）。自评的人工智能检测信心和人工智能暴露与准确性呈正相关，并且在统计上解释了与年龄相关的下降的部分原因，其中信心占较大份额。在流动队列中，50 多岁和 60 多岁的参与者中出现了与年龄相关的性别差异，其中女性参与者的表现较差。 Trial-level reaction-time models showed that correct AI judgments were faster than correct real judgments, whereas incorrect AI judgments were slower than incorrect real judgments. ChatGPT-4o 肖像比 Imagen 3 肖像更难分类且更慢，并且与年龄相关的性能下降更严重。这些发现将人工智能肖像检测视为一个由年龄、性别、设备环境和信心决定的人为因素问题，而不仅仅是图像真实感。
Abstract：Generative AI now produces photorealistic portraits that circulate widely in social and newslike contexts. Human ability to distinguish real from synthetic faces is time-sensitive because image generators continue to improve while public familiarity with synthetic media also changes. Here, we provide a time-stamped snapshot of human ability to distinguish real from AI-generated portraits produced by models available in July 2025. In a large-scale web experiment conducted from August 2025 to January 2026, 1,664 participants aged 20-69 years (mobile n = 1,330; PC n = 334) completed a two-alternative forced-choice task (REAL vs AI). Each participant judged 20 trials sampled from a 210-image pool comprising real FFHQ photographs and AI-generated portraits from ChatGPT-4o and Imagen 3. Overall accuracy was high (mean 85.2%, median 90%) but varied across groups. PC participants outperformed mobile participants by 3.65 percentage points. Accuracy declined with age in both device cohorts and more steeply on mobile than on PC (-0.607 vs -0.230 percentage points per year). Self-rated AI-detection confidence and AI exposure were positively associated with accuracy and statistically accounted for part of the age-related decline, with confidence accounting for the larger share. In the mobile cohort, an age-related sex divergence emerged among participants in their 50s and 60s, with female participants performing worse. Trial-level reaction-time models showed that correct AI judgments were faster than correct real judgments, whereas incorrect AI judgments were slower than incorrect real judgments. ChatGPT-4o portraits were harder and slower to classify than Imagen 3 portraits and were associated with a steeper age-related decline in performance. These findings frame AI portrait detection as a human-factors problem shaped by age, sex, device context, and confidence, not image realism alone.

 


【4】Skewed Dual Normal Distribution Model: Predicting Touch Pointing Success Rates for Targets Near Screen Edges and Corners

标题 : 偏斜双正态分布模型：预测屏幕边缘和角落附近目标的触摸指向成功率
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23865
作者：Nobuhito Kasahara,Shota Yamanaka,Homei Miyashita
摘要：典型的点击成功率预测模型排除了屏幕边缘附近的目标。然而，设计限制通常会迫使这样的放置，并且在可滚动用户界面中，任何元素都可以移动到靠近屏幕边缘。在这项工作中，我们模拟了目标边缘距离如何影响触摸指向精度。我们提出了倾斜双正态分布模型，该模型假设点击坐标分布因附近的边缘而倾斜。结果表明，当目标接近边缘时，分布的峰值向边缘移动，而其尾部则向外延伸。与之前的报告相比，当目标触及边缘时，成功率有所提高，这表明了一种“将目标与边缘一起敲击”的策略。我们的模型可以预测各种条件下的成功率，包括边缘相邻的目标。通过水平、垂直和二维指向的三个实验，我们证明了我们提出的模型的普遍性和实用性。
Abstract：Typical success-rate prediction models for tapping exclude targets near screen edges. However, design constraints often force such placements, and in scrollable user interfaces, any element can move close to the screen edges. In this work, we model how target-edge distance affects touch pointing accuracy. We propose the Skewed Dual Normal Distribution Model, which assumes the tap-coordinate distribution is skewed by a nearby edge. The results showed that as targets approached the edge, the distribution's peak shifted toward the edge, and its tail extended away. In contrast to prior reports, the success rate improved when the target touched the edge, suggesting a strategy of ``tapping the target together with the edge.'' Our model predicts success rates across a wide range of conditions, including edge-adjacent targets. Through three experiments of horizontal, vertical, and 2D pointing, we demonstrated the generalizability and utility of our proposed model.

 


【5】General Intellectual Humility Is Malleable Through AI-Mediated Reflective Dialogue

标题 : 通过人工智能介导的反思性对话，普遍的知识谦逊是可塑的
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23855
作者：Mohammad Ratul Mahjabin,Raiyan Abdul Baten
摘要：一般智力谦逊（GIH）——承认一个人的信念可能会犯错和可以修正——与推理、学习和社会话语的改善有关，但被广泛认为是一种抵抗干预的稳定特质。我们测试是否可以通过将阶段性认知支架与个性化苏格拉底式反思相结合的对话干预来提高 GIH。在一项随机对照实验（N=400）中，参与者进行了由法学硕士介导的结构化对话，从对知识谦逊的概念理解发展到应用、分析、评估和生成新颖的、自我相关的场景来实例化它。相对于时间匹配对照，干预产生了 GIH 的系统性增加，降低了排序稳定性，并使可靠的个体改善率增加了两倍。至关重要的是，这些影响在两周的随访中持续存在，没有发现任何衰减。这些影响普遍存在于政治派别中，并且不依赖于基线人格特征。这些发现挑战了普遍存在的关于 GIH 可塑性的悲观情绪，并表明通过结构化对话进行的支架式苏格拉底式反思可以对普遍的知识谦逊产生持久的改变。
Abstract：General intellectual humility (GIH) -- the recognition that one's beliefs may be fallible and revisable -- is associated with improved reasoning, learning, and social discourse, yet is widely regarded as a stable trait resistant to intervention. We test whether GIH can be elevated through a conversational intervention that combines staged cognitive scaffolding with personalized Socratic reflection. In a randomized controlled experiment (N=400), participants engaged in a structured, LLM-mediated dialogue that progressed from conceptual understanding of intellectual humility to applying, analyzing, evaluating, and generating novel, self-relevant scenarios that instantiate it. Relative to a time-matched control, the intervention produced a systematic increase in GIH, reduced rank-order stability, and tripled the rate of reliable individual improvement. Crucially, these effects persisted over a two-week follow-up without detectable decay. The effects generalized across political affiliation and did not depend on baseline personality profile. These findings challenge the prevailing pessimism regarding the malleability of GIH and suggest that scaffolded, Socratic reflection delivered through structured dialogue can produce durable changes in general intellectual humility.

 


【6】CodeExemplar: Example-Based Scaffolding for Introductory Programming in the GenAI Era

标题 : CodeExemplar：GenAI 时代入门编程的基于示例的脚手架
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23830
作者：Boxuan Ma,Shinichi Konomi
摘要：Generative AI (GenAI) can generate working code with minimal effort, creating a tension in introductory programming: students need timely help, yet direct solutions invite copying and can short-circuit reasoning.为了解决这个问题，我们提出了基于示例的脚手架，其中 GenAI 提供了与目标任务的底层推理模式相匹配但上下文不同的脚手架示例，以支持类比转移，同时减少复制。我们提供二维分类法、设计指南和 CodeExemplar，这是一个与自动评分任务集成的原型，以及来自课堂试点和讲师访谈的初步形成性反馈。
Abstract：Generative AI (GenAI) can generate working code with minimal effort, creating a tension in introductory programming: students need timely help, yet direct solutions invite copying and can short-circuit reasoning. To address this, we propose example-based scaffolding, where GenAI provides scaffold examples that match a target task's underlying reasoning pattern but differ in contexts to support analogical transfer while reducing copying. We contribute a two-dimensional taxonomy, design guidelines, and CodeExemplar, a prototype integrated with auto-graded tasks, with initial formative feedback from a classroom pilot and instructor interviews.

 


【7】Aesthetics of Robot-Mediated Applied Drama: A Case Study on REMind

标题 : 机器人应用戏剧美学：以REMind为例
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23816
作者：Elaheh Sanoubari,Alicia Pan,Keith Rebello,Neil Fernandes,Andrew Houston,Kerstin Dautenhahn
摘要：社交机器人越来越多地用于教育领域，但大多数应用程序将它们视为提供基于解释的指导的导师。我们探索另一种选择：机器人介导的应用戏剧（RMAD），其中机器人在互动戏剧体验中充当栩栩如生的木偶，旨在支持反思和社交情感学习。本文介绍了 REMind，这是一款反欺凌机器人角色扮演游戏，可以帮助孩子们练习旁观者干预和同伴支持。我们专注于 RMAD 的一个核心设计挑战：尽管当前机器人平台的表达能力有限，如何使机器人戏剧在情感和美学上引人入胜。通过 REMind 的开发，我们展示了表演艺术专业知识如何影响这一过程，并认为机器人戏剧的美学源于更广泛体验的协调设计，而不仅仅是机器人的表现力。
Abstract：Social robots are increasingly used in education, but most applications cast them as tutors offering explanation-based instruction. We explore an alternative: Robot-Mediated Applied Drama (RMAD), in which robots function as life-like puppets in interactive dramatic experiences designed to support reflection and social-emotional learning. This paper presents REMind, an anti-bullying robot role-play game that helps children rehearse bystander intervention and peer support. We focus on a central design challenge in RMAD: how to make robot drama emotionally and aesthetically engaging despite the limited expressive capacities of current robotic platforms. Through the development of REMind, we show how performing arts expertise informed this process, and argue that the aesthetics of robot drama arise from the coordinated design of the wider experience, not from robot expressivity alone.

 


【8】A Reproducible Reality-to-VR Pipeline for Ecologically Valid Aging-in-Place Research

标题 : 用于生态有效的就地老龄化研究的可复制现实到 VR 管道
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23812
作者：Ibrahim Bilau,Stacie Smith,Abdurrahman Baru,Marwan Shagar,Brian Jones,Eunhwa Yang
摘要：虚拟现实 (VR) 已成为评估老年人日常生活工具性活动 (IADL) 的一种很有前途的工具。然而，这些模拟的生态有效性常常受到简化或低保真环境设计的影响，无法引发真正的存在感。本文记录了一个可复制的现实到 VR 管道，用于创建逼真的环境模拟，以支持认知老化的研究。拟议的工作流程使用地面激光扫描 (TLS) 捕获了佐治亚理工学院 Aware Home 大楼的竣工厨房，以实现亚毫米几何精度，然后在 Faro SCENE 中进行点云处理，在 SketchUp 中进行几何重新拓扑，并通过 Datasmith 与 Lumen 全局照明集成到虚幻引擎 5 中，以实现高视觉保真度。该管道实现了逼真的渲染，同时保持稳定的 90 Hz 帧速率，这是缓解老年人晕机症的关键阈值。该环境还可以即时操纵环境变量，例如在封闭式橱柜和开放式搁架之间切换，从而提供物理环境中不可能实现的实验灵活性。对 17 名老年人进行的参与者验证证实了晕机风险最小，并且保留了对实验操作的敏感性，支持了该管道进行就地老龄化研究的可行性，并为未来的比较研究建立了基准。
Abstract：Virtual reality (VR) has emerged as a promising tool for assessing instrumental activities of daily living (IADLs) in older adults. However, the ecological validity of these simulations is often compromised by simplified or low-fidelity environmental design that fails to elicit a genuine sense of presence. This paper documents a reproducible Reality-to-VR pipeline for creating a photorealistic environmental simulation to support a study on cognitive aging in place. The proposed workflow captured the as-built kitchen of the Aware Home building at Georgia Tech using Terrestrial Laser Scanning (TLS) for sub-millimeter geometric accuracy, followed by point cloud processing in Faro SCENE, geometric retopology in SketchUp, and integration into Unreal Engine 5 via Datasmith with Lumen global illumination for high visual fidelity. The pipeline achieved photorealistic rendering while maintaining a stable 90 Hz frame rate, a critical threshold for mitigating cybersickness in older populations. The environment also enables instantaneous manipulation of environmental variables, such as switching between closed cabinetry and open shelving, providing experimental flexibility impossible in physical settings. Participant validation with 17 older adults confirmed minimal cybersickness risk and preserved sensitivity to the experimental manipulation, supporting the pipeline's feasibility for aging-in-place research and establishing a benchmark for future comparative studies.

 


【9】AI Fortune-Teller: Juxtaposing Shaman and AI to Reveal Human Agency in the Age of AI

标题 : 人工智能算命师：将萨满与人工智能并置，揭示人工智能时代的人类能动性
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23811
作者：Soonho Kwon,Dong Whi Yoo,Younah Kang
摘要：这段推测性视频展示了参与者与职业咨询人工智能代理的互动，他们没有意识到这些反应实际上是来自 mudang（韩国传统萨满）的算命。我们的工作捕捉到了这种欺骗行为并记录了参与者的反应，展示了他们在揭露后对代理人建议的最初看法的变化。值得注意的是，即使在得知建议来自 mudang 而不是人工智能之后，参与者也没有改变他们对收到的建议的最初态度。这引发了人们对人工智能可解释性和准确性的重要性的质疑。通过将科学方法和前科学方法并列，我们的目标是引发关于人工智能时代人类能动性的讨论。我们认为，无论人工智能如何进步，我们仍然以人类的基本方式来驾驭生活——极其混乱和不确定。
Abstract：This speculative video piece showcases participants interacting with a career counseling AI agent, unaware that the responses were actually derived from the fortunetelling of a mudang (a Korean traditional shaman). Our work captures this deception and documents participants' reactions, showcasing shifts in their initial perceptions of the agent's advice following the reveal. Notably, even after learning that the advice came from a mudang rather than an AI, participants did not change their initial attitudes toward the advice they received. This raises questions about the perceived importance of AI's explainability and accuracy. By juxtaposing scientific and pre-scientific approaches, we aim to provoke discussions on human agency in the age of AI. We argue that, regardless of AI's advancements, we continue to navigate life in fundamentally human ways -- wonderfully messy and uncertain.

 


【10】Exploring Self-Tracking Practices of Older Adults with CVD to Inform the Design of LLM-Enabled Health Data Sensemaking

标题 : 探索患有 CVD 的老年人的自我跟踪实践，为法学硕士支持的健康数据意义建构的设计提供信息
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.23733
作者：Duosi Dai,Pavithren V S Pakianathan,Gunnar Treff,Mahdi Sareban,Jan David Smeddinck,Sanna Kuoppamäki
摘要：可穿戴设备和移动健康应用越来越多地用于慢性病的自我管理；然而，对于患有心血管疾病 (CVD) 的老年人来说，这些数据让人感觉难以承受。本研究探讨了他们如何理解自我跟踪数据，并确定支持大型语言模型 (LLM) 的设计机会。我们对 8 名 64-82 岁的 CVD 患者进行了为期 7 天的日记研究和随访采访。我们确定了六个主题：驾驭情感复杂性、拥有健康叙事、优先考虑身体感觉、有选择地参与健康指标、协商共享的社会技术动态以及对人工智能持谨慎乐观态度。研究结果强调，自我追踪是情感性的、解释性的和社会性的。我们概述了法学硕士支持的数据意义构建系统的设计方向：支持情感参与、加强患者能动性、承认具体经验以及促进临床和社会环境中的对话。为了支持安全，专家参与机制至关重要。这些方向阐明了法学硕士如何帮助将数据转化为叙述，并对人类数据交互和行为改变支持产生影响。
Abstract：Wearables and mobile health applications are increasingly adopted for self-management of chronic illnesses; yet the data feels overwhelming for older adults with cardiovascular disease (CVD). This study explores how they make sense of self-tracked data and identifies design opportunities for Large Language Model (LLM)-enabled support. We conducted a seven-day diary study and follow-up interviews with eight CVD patients aged 64-82. We identified six themes: navigating emotional complexity, owning health narratives, prioritizing bodily sensations, selective engagement with health metrics, negotiating socio-technical dynamics of sharing, and cautious optimism toward AI. Findings highlight that self-tracking is affective, interpretive, and socially situated. We outline design directions for LLM-enabled data sensemaking systems: supporting emotional engagement, reinforcing patient agency, acknowledging embodied experiences, and prompting dialogue in clinical and social contexts. To support safety, expert-in-the-loop mechanisms are essential. These directions articulate how LLMs can help translate data into narratives and carry implications for human-data interaction and behavior-change support.

 


 

机器人技术(cs.RO:Robotics)

【1】LATS: Large Language Model Assisted Teacher-Student Framework for Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning in Traffic Signal Control

标题 : LATS：交通信号控制中多智能体强化学习的大语言模型辅助师生框架
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24361
作者：Yifeng Zhang,Peizhuo Li,Tingguang Zhou,Mingfeng Fan,Guillaume Sartoretti
摘要：自适应交通信号控制 (ATSC) 旨在通过实时调整交通灯来优化交通流量并最大限度地减少延误。多智能体强化学习 (MARL) 的最新进展为 ATSC 带来了希望，但现有方法仍然受到表示能力有限的影响，常常导致在复杂和动态的交通环境中性能不佳和泛化能力差。另一方面，大型语言模型（LLM）擅长语义表示、推理和分析，但它们的幻觉倾向和推理速度慢往往阻碍了它们直接应用于决策任务。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了一种名为 LATS 的新型学习范式，它整合了 LLM 和 MARL，利用前者强大的先验知识和归纳能力来增强后者的决策过程。具体来说，我们引入了一个即插即用的师生学习模块，其中训练有素的嵌入法学硕士作为教师生成丰富的语义特征，捕获每个交叉口的拓扑结构和交通动态。然后，一个更简单的（学生）神经网络通过潜在空间中的知识蒸馏学习模拟这些特征，使最终模型能够独立于 LLM 运行，以便在 RL 决策过程中的下游使用。这种集成显着增强了整个模型在不同交通场景中的表示能力，从而产生更高效和通用的控制策略。跨不同流量数据集的大量实验凭经验证明，我们的方法增强了 RL 模型的表示学习能力，从而比传统 RL 和仅 LLM 方法提高了整体性能和泛化能力。 [...]
Abstract：Adaptive Traffic Signal Control (ATSC) aims to optimize traffic flow and minimize delays by adjusting traffic lights in real time. Recent advances in Multi-agent Reinforcement Learning (MARL) have shown promise for ATSC, yet existing approaches still suffer from limited representational capacity, often leading to suboptimal performance and poor generalization in complex and dynamic traffic environments. On the other hand, Large Language Models (LLMs) excel at semantic representation, reasoning, and analysis, yet their propensity for hallucination and slow inference speeds often hinder their direct application to decision-making tasks. To address these challenges, we propose a novel learning paradigm named LATS that integrates LLMs and MARL, leveraging the former's strong prior knowledge and inductive abilities to enhance the latter's decision-making process. Specifically, we introduce a plug-and-play teacher-student learning module, where a trained embedding LLM serves as a teacher to generate rich semantic features that capture each intersection's topology structures and traffic dynamics. A much simpler (student) neural network then learns to emulate these features through knowledge distillation in the latent space, enabling the final model to operate independently from the LLM for downstream use in the RL decision-making process. This integration significantly enhances the overall model's representational capacity across diverse traffic scenarios, thus leading to more efficient and generalizable control strategies. Extensive experiments across diverse traffic datasets empirically demonstrate that our method enhances the representation learning capability of RL models, thereby leading to improved overall performance and generalization over both traditional RL and LLM-only approaches. [...]

 


【2】A Sensorless, Inherently Compliant Anthropomorphic Musculoskeletal Hand Driven by Electrohydraulic Actuators

标题 : 由电液执行器驱动的无传感器、固有兼容的拟人肌肉骨骼手
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24357
作者：Misato Sonoda,Ronan Hinchet,Amirhossein Kazemipour,Yasunori Toshimitsu,Robert K. Katzschmann
摘要：非结构化环境中的机器人操纵需要将高运动灵活性与物理顺应性结合起来的末端执行器。虽然传统的刚性手依赖复杂的外部传感器来实现安全交互，但电动液压执行器提供了一种有前途的替代方案。本文介绍了一种新型肌肉骨骼机器人手架构的设计、控制和评估，该架构完全由远程 Peano-HASEL 执行器提供动力，并专门针对安全操作进行了优化。通过将执行器重新定位到前臂，我们在功能上将抓取接口与电气危险隔离开来，同时保持纤细的、类似人类的轮廓。为了解决这些软执行器固有的有限线性收缩问题，我们集成了 1:2 滑轮布线机构，可以机械地放大肌腱位移。由此产生的系统优先考虑顺应性交互而不是高有效负载能力，利用执行器的固有力限制特性来提供高水平的固有安全性。此外，HASEL 执行器的自感应特性增强了这种物理安全性。通过简单地监测工作电流，我们无需依赖外部力传感器或编码器即可实现实时抓取检测和闭环接触感知控制。实验结果验证了系统的灵巧性和固有安全性，证明了各种抓取分类法的成功执行以及对高度易碎物体（例如纸气球）的非破坏性抓取。这些发现凸显了朝着简化、本质上顺应的软机器人操作迈出的重要一步。
Abstract：Robotic manipulation in unstructured environments requires end-effectors that combine high kinematic dexterity with physical compliance. While traditional rigid hands rely on complex external sensors for safe interaction, electrohydraulic actuators offer a promising alternative. This paper presents the design, control, and evaluation of a novel musculoskeletal robotic hand architecture powered entirely by remote Peano-HASEL actuators, specifically optimized for safe manipulation. By relocating the actuators to the forearm, we functionally isolate the grasping interface from electrical hazards while maintaining a slim, human-like profile. To address the inherently limited linear contraction of these soft actuators, we integrate a 1:2 pulley routing mechanism that mechanically amplifies tendon displacement. The resulting system prioritizes compliant interaction over high payload capacity, leveraging the intrinsic force-limiting characteristics of the actuators to provide a high level of inherent safety. Furthermore, this physical safety is augmented by the self-sensing nature of the HASEL actuators. By simply monitoring the operating current, we achieve real-time grasp detection and closed-loop contact-aware control without relying on external force transducers or encoders. Experimental results validate the system's dexterity and inherent safety, demonstrating the successful execution of various grasp taxonomies and the non-destructive grasping of highly fragile objects, such as a paper balloon. These findings highlight a significant step toward simplified, inherently compliant soft robotic manipulation.

 


【3】Evidence of an Emergent "Self" in Continual Robot Learning

标题 : 机器人持续学习中涌现的“自我”的证据
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24350
作者：Adidev Jhunjhunwala,Judah Goldfeder,Hod Lipson
摘要：理解自我意识的一个关键挑战是量化智能系统是否具有“自我”概念的原则性方法，以及如果有的话如何将“自我”与其他认知结构区分开来。我们认为，“自我”可以通过寻找认知过程中不变的部分来隔离，与更快速获得的认知知识和技能相比，该部分变化相对较小，因为我们的自我是我们经验中最持久的方面。我们利用这一原理分析了两种情况下机器人的认知结构：一个机器人学习恒定的任务，而第二个机器人在可变任务下持续学习。我们发现，经过持续学习的机器人会形成一个不变的子网络，与控制相比，该子网络明显更加稳定（p < 0.001）。我们认为这一原则可以为在其他认知人工智能系统中探索自我提供一个窗口。
Abstract：A key challenge to understanding self-awareness has been a principled way of quantifying whether an intelligent system has a concept of a "self," and if so how to differentiate the "self" from other cognitive structures. We propose that the "self" can be isolated by seeking the invariant portion of cognitive process that changes relatively little compared to more rapidly acquired cognitive knowledge and skills, because our self is the most persistent aspect of our experiences. We used this principle to analyze the cognitive structure of robots under two conditions: One robot learns a constant task, while a second robot is subjected to continual learning under variable tasks. We find that robots subjected to continual learning develop an invariant subnetwork that is significantly more stable (p < 0.001) compared to the control. We suggest that this principle can offer a window into exploring selfhood in other cognitive AI systems.

 


【4】Toward Generalist Neural Motion Planners for Robotic Manipulators: Challenges and Opportunities

标题 : 走向机器人操纵器的通用神经运动规划器：挑战和机遇
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24318
作者：Davood Soleymanzadeh,Ivan Lopez-Sanchez,Hao Su,Yunzhu Li,Xiao Liang,Minghui Zheng
摘要：最先进的通用操纵策略使得机器人操纵器能够在非结构化的人类环境中部署。然而，这些框架在混乱的环境中举步维艰，主要是因为它们利用辅助模块进行低级运动规划和控制。由于机器人配置空间的高维性和工作空间障碍物的存在，运动规划仍然具有挑战性。神经运动规划器通过提供快速推理并有效处理运动规划问题固有的多模态来提高运动规划效率。尽管有这些好处，当前的神经运动规划器通常很难推广到看不见的、分布外的规划设置。本文回顾并分析了最先进的神经运动规划器，强调了它们的优点和局限性。它还概述了建立能够处理特定领域挑战的通用神经运动规划器的路径。有关审阅论文的列表，请参阅 https://davoodsz.github.io/planning-manip-survey.github.io/。
Abstract：State-of-the-art generalist manipulation policies have enabled the deployment of robotic manipulators in unstructured human environments. However, these frameworks struggle in cluttered environments primarily because they utilize auxiliary modules for low-level motion planning and control. Motion planning remains challenging due to the high dimensionality of the robot's configuration space and the presence of workspace obstacles. Neural motion planners have enhanced motion planning efficiency by offering fast inference and effectively handling the inherent multi-modality of the motion planning problem. Despite such benefits, current neural motion planners often struggle to generalize to unseen, out-of-distribution planning settings. This paper reviews and analyzes the state-of-the-art neural motion planners, highlighting both their benefits and limitations. It also outlines a path toward establishing generalist neural motion planners capable of handling domain-specific challenges. For a list of the reviewed papers, please refer to https://davoodsz.github.io/planning-manip-survey.github.io/.

 


【5】Decentralized End-to-End Multi-AAV Pursuit Using Predictive Spatio-Temporal Observation via Deep Reinforcement Learning

标题 : 通过深度强化学习使用预测时空观察进行去中心化端到端多 AAV 追踪
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24238
作者：Yude Li,Zhexuan Zhou,Huizhe Li,Yanke Sun,Yenan Wu,Yichen Lai,Yiming Wang,Youmin Gong,Jie Mei
摘要：杂乱环境中的分散式合作追踪对于自主空中集群来说是一个挑战，特别是在局部和嘈杂的感知下。现有的方法通常依赖于抽象的几何特征或特权的真实状态，因此回避了现实世界环境中的感知不确定性。我们提出了一种去中心化的端到端多智能体强化学习（MARL）框架，将原始激光雷达观测结果直接映射到连续控制命令。该框架的核心是预测时空观察（PSTO），这是一种以自我为中心的网格表示，可以在统一的固定分辨率投影中将障碍物几何形状与预测对抗意图和队友运动对齐。建立在 PSTO 的基础上，单一的去中心化策略使代理能够导航静态障碍、拦截动态目标并维持合作包围圈。仿真表明，与依赖特权障碍物信息的最先进的基于学习的方法相比，所提出的方法实现了卓越的捕获效率和有竞争力的成功率。此外，统一的策略可以在不同的团队规模之间无缝扩展，无需重新培训。最后，完全自主的户外实验验证了仅依赖于机载传感和计算的四旋翼飞行器群的框架。
Abstract：Decentralized cooperative pursuit in cluttered environments is challenging for autonomous aerial swarms, especially under partial and noisy perception. Existing methods often rely on abstracted geometric features or privileged ground-truth states, and therefore sidestep perceptual uncertainty in real-world settings. We propose a decentralized end-to-end multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) framework that maps raw LiDAR observations directly to continuous control commands. Central to the framework is the Predictive Spatio-Temporal Observation (PSTO), an egocentric grid representation that aligns obstacle geometry with predictive adversarial intent and teammate motion in a unified, fixed-resolution projection. Built on PSTO, a single decentralized policy enables agents to navigate static obstacles, intercept dynamic targets, and maintain cooperative encirclement. Simulations demonstrate that the proposed method achieves superior capture efficiency and competitive success rates compared to state-of-the-art learning-based approaches relying on privileged obstacle information. Furthermore, the unified policy scales seamlessly across different team sizes without retraining. Finally, fully autonomous outdoor experiments validate the framework on a quadrotor swarm relying on only onboard sensing and computing.

 


【6】Environment-Grounded Multi-Agent Workflow for Autonomous Penetration Testing

标题 : 用于自主渗透测试的基于环境的多代理工作流程
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24221
作者：Michael Somma,Markus Großpointner,Paul Zabalegui,Eppu Heilimo,Branka Stojanović
摘要：数字基础设施日益复杂和互联，使得可扩展且可靠的安全评估方法变得至关重要。机器人系统代表了一类特别重要的操作技术，因为现代机器人是高度网络化的网络物理系统，部署在工业自动化、物流和自主服务等领域。本文探讨了在机器人环境中使用大型语言模型进行自动化渗透测试。我们提出了一种适合基于机器人的系统的基于环境的多智能体架构。该方法在执行期间动态构建基于共享图的内存，捕获可观察的系统状态，包括网络拓扑、通信通道、漏洞和尝试的漏洞利用。这实现了结构化自动化，同时在整个测试过程中保持可追溯性和有效的上下文管理。在专门的机器人夺旗场景 (ROS/ROS2) 中进行多次迭代评估后，该系统表现出高可靠性，在 100% 的测试运行中成功完成了挑战 (n=5)。这一性能显着超过了文献基准，同时保持了欧盟人工智能法案等框架所需的可追溯性和人工监督。
Abstract：The increasing complexity and interconnectivity of digital infrastructures make scalable and reliable security assessment methods essential. Robotic systems represent a particularly important class of operational technology, as modern robots are highly networked cyber-physical systems deployed in domains such as industrial automation, logistics, and autonomous services. This paper explores the use of large language models for automated penetration testing in robotic environments. We propose an environment-grounded multi-agent architecture tailored to Robotics-based systems. The approach dynamically constructs a shared graph-based memory during execution that captures the observable system state, including network topology, communication channels, vulnerabilities, and attempted exploits. This enables structured automation while maintaining traceability and effective context management throughout the testing process. Evaluated across multiple iterations within a specialized robotics Capture-the-Flag scenario (ROS/ROS2), the system demonstrated high reliability, successfully completing the challenge in 100\% of test runs (n=5). This performance significantly exceeds literature benchmarks while maintaining the traceability and human oversight required by frameworks like the EU AI Act.

 


【7】Goal-Oriented Reactive Simulation for Closed-Loop Trajectory Prediction

标题 : 用于闭环轨迹预测的面向目标的反应仿真
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24155
作者：Harsh Yadav,Tobias Meisen
摘要：当前的轨迹预测模型主要以开环方式进行训练，这在现实世界的闭环设置中部署时通常会导致协变量偏移和复合误差。此外，依赖静态数据集或非反应性日志重播模拟器会切断交互循环，从而阻止自我代理学习主动协商周围的流量。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种针对高频、后退地平线自我预测进行优化的策略闭环训练范例。为了将自我预测建立在交通交互的真实表示中并实现反应一致性，我们引入了一种面向目标、基于变压器的场景解码器，从而产生了固有的反应训练模拟。通过将自我代理暴露于开环数据和模拟的自诱导状态的混合中，模型学习恢复行为以纠正其自身的执行错误。广泛的评估表明，闭环训练显着增强了高重新规划频率下的避碰能力，与开环基线相比，在 nuScenes 上相对碰撞率降低了 27.0%，在密集 DeepScenario 交叉口中相对碰撞率降低了 79.5%。此外，我们还表明，将反应性与非反应性周围代理相结合的混合模拟可以实现即时交互性和长期行为稳定性之间的最佳平衡。
Abstract：Current trajectory prediction models are primarily trained in an open-loop manner, which often leads to covariate shift and compounding errors when deployed in real-world, closed-loop settings. Furthermore, relying on static datasets or non-reactive log-replay simulators severs the interactive loop, preventing the ego agent from learning to actively negotiate surrounding traffic. In this work, we propose an on-policy closed-loop training paradigm optimized for high-frequency, receding horizon ego prediction. To ground the ego prediction in a realistic representation of traffic interactions and to achieve reactive consistency, we introduce a goal-oriented, transformer-based scene decoder, resulting in an inherently reactive training simulation. By exposing the ego agent to a mixture of open-loop data and simulated, self-induced states, the model learns recovery behaviors to correct its own execution errors. Extensive evaluation demonstrates that closed-loop training significantly enhances collision avoidance capabilities at high replanning frequencies, yielding relative collision rate reductions of up to 27.0% on nuScenes and 79.5% in dense DeepScenario intersections compared to open-loop baselines. Additionally, we show that a hybrid simulation combining reactive with non-reactive surrounding agents achieves optimal balance between immediate interactivity and long-term behavioral stability.

 


【8】Accelerated Spline-Based Time-Optimal Motion Planning with Continuous Safety Guarantees for Non-Differentially Flat Systems

标题 : 基于加速样条的时间最优运动规划，为非差动平坦系统提供持续安全保证
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24133
作者：Dries Dirckx,Jan Swevers,Wilm Decré
摘要：为自主移动机器人生成时间最优、无碰撞的轨迹需要在保证安全性和管理计算复杂性之间进行基本权衡。最先进的方法将基于样条的运动规划制定为单个最优控制问题（OCP），但通常会受到较高的计算成本的影响，因为它们将分离的超平面参数作为决策变量来强制连续避免碰撞。本文提出了一种新方法，通过将分离超平面的确定与 OCP 解耦来缓解这一瓶颈。通过将分离定理视为可通过线性系统或二次规划求解的独立分类问题，该方法从优化变量中消除了超平面参数，有效地将非凸约束转化为线性约束。实验验证表明，与障碍物丰富的环境中的完全耦合方法相比，这种解耦方法可将轨迹计算时间减少近 60%，同时保持严格的连续安全保证。
Abstract：Generating time-optimal, collision-free trajectories for autonomous mobile robots involves a fundamental trade-off between guaranteeing safety and managing computational complexity. State-of-the-art approaches formulate spline-based motion planning as a single Optimal Control Problem (OCP) but often suffer from high computational cost because they include separating hyperplane parameters as decision variables to enforce continuous collision avoidance. This paper presents a novel method that alleviates this bottleneck by decoupling the determination of separating hyperplanes from the OCP. By treating the separation theorem as an independent classification problem solvable via a linear system or quadratic program, the proposed method eliminates hyperplane parameters from the optimisation variables, effectively transforming non-convex constraints into linear ones. Experimental validation demonstrates that this decoupled approach reduces trajectory computation times up to almost 60% compared to fully coupled methods in obstacle-rich environments, while maintaining rigorous continuous safety guarantees.

 


【9】Equivariant Filter Transformations for Consistent and Efficient Visual--Inertial Navigation

标题 : 用于一致且高效视觉的等变滤波器变换——惯性导航
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24130
作者：Chungeng Tian,Fenghua He,Ning Hao
摘要：本文提出了一种用于视觉惯性导航的等变滤波器（EqF）变换方法。通过在具有不同对称性的 EqF 之间建立分析联系，所提出的方法可以实现系统的一致性设计和高效的实施。首先，我们形式化从全局系统状态到局部误差状态的映射，并证明它会引起任意两个 EqF 的误差状态之间的非奇异线性变换。其次，我们推导出相关线性误差状态系统和不可观测子空间的变换定律。这些结果产生了一般的一致性设计原则：对于任何不可观测系统，可以通过变换局部坐标图来合成具有状态无关的不可观测子空间的一致EqF，从而避免临时对称性分析。第三，为了减轻一致性所需的非块对角雅可比行列式所带来的计算负担，我们提出了两种有效的实现策略。这些策略利用具有块对角线结构的更简单 EqF 的雅可比矩阵来加速协方差运算，同时保持一致性。广泛的蒙特卡洛模拟和现实世界实验在准确性和运行时间方面验证了所提出的方法。
Abstract：This paper presents an equivariant filter (EqF) transformation approach for visual--inertial navigation. By establishing analytical links between EqFs with different symmetries, the proposed approach enables systematic consistency design and efficient implementation. First, we formalize the mapping from the global system state to the local error-state and prove that it induces a nonsingular linear transformation between the error-states of any two EqFs. Second, we derive transformation laws for the associated linearized error-state systems and unobservable subspaces. These results yield a general consistency design principle: for any unobservable system, a consistent EqF with a state-independent unobservable subspace can be synthesized by transforming the local coordinate chart, thereby avoiding ad hoc symmetry analysis. Third, to mitigate the computational burden arising from the non-block-diagonal Jacobians required for consistency, we propose two efficient implementation strategies. These strategies exploit the Jacobians of a simpler EqF with block-diagonal structure to accelerate covariance operations while preserving consistency. Extensive Monte Carlo simulations and real-world experiments validate the proposed approach in terms of both accuracy and runtime.

 


【10】Knowledge-Guided Manipulation Using Multi-Task Reinforcement Learning

标题 : 使用多任务强化学习的知识引导操作
链接 : https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.24083
作者：Aditya Narendra,Mukhammadrizo Maribjonov,Dmitry Makarov,Dmitry Yudin,Aleksandr Panov
摘要：本文介绍了基于知识图的大规模多任务模型策略优化（KG-M3PO），这是一种在部分可观察的设置中进行多任务机器人操作的框架，它统一了感知、知识和策略。该方法通过在线 3D 场景图增强以自我为中心的视觉，将开放词汇检测转化为度量的关系表示。动态关系机制在每一步都会更新空间、包含和可供性边缘，并且图神经编码器通过 RL 目标进行端到端训练，以便关系特征直接由控制性能塑造。多种观察模式（视觉、本体感受、语言和基于图形的）被编码到共享的潜在空间中，强化学习代理在该空间上运行以驱动控制循环。轻量级图查询的策略条件以及视觉和本体感受输入，为决策生成紧凑的、语义信息丰富的状态。对一系列具有遮挡、干扰和布局变化的操作任务进行的实验表明，与强基线相比，获得了一致的增益：知识条件代理实现了更高的成功率，提高了样本效率，并对新物体和未见过的场景配置具有更强的泛化能力。这些结果支持这样一个前提：结构化、持续维护的世界知识是可扩展、可泛化操作的强大归纳偏差：当知识模块参与 RL 计算图时，关系表示与控制保持一致，从而在部分可观测性下实现稳健的长期行为。
Abstract：This paper introduces Knowledge Graph based Massively Multi-task Model-based Policy Optimization (KG-M3PO), a framework for multi-task robotic manipulation in partially observable settings that unifies Perception, Knowledge, and Policy. The method augments egocentric vision with an online 3D scene graph that grounds open-vocabulary detections into a metric, relational representation. A dynamic-relation mechanism updates spatial, containment, and affordance edges at every step, and a graph neural encoder is trained end-to-end through the RL objective so that relational features are shaped directly by control performance. Multiple observation modalities (visual, proprioceptive, linguistic, and graph-based) are encoded into a shared latent space, upon which the RL agent operates to drive the control loop. The policy conditions on lightweight graph queries alongside visual and proprioceptive inputs, yielding a compact, semantically informed state for decision making. Experiments on a suite of manipulation tasks with occlusions, distractors, and layout shifts demonstrate consistent gains over strong baselines: the knowledge-conditioned agent achieves higher success rates, improved sample efficiency, and stronger generalization to novel objects and unseen scene configurations. These results support the premise that structured, continuously maintained world knowledge is a powerful inductive bias for scalable, generalizable manipulation: when the knowledge module participates in the RL computation graph, relational representations align with control, enabling robust long-horizon behavior under partial observability.
